abilities.description:
You are afflicted with a mutation. When you make a move bolstered by the change, add +2 and fill one segment of an 8-segment clock. When the clock is filled, choose one and clear the clock.

  • Raise one stat by 1 (max 5), and reduce another by 1 (min 0). Mark both stats as corrupted.
  • Discard one path asset for another with 2 marked abilities. This asset is corrupted.

Once a stat is corrupted twice, or all path assets are corrupted, activate this ability at no cost. The mutation takes hold, prevailing against an otherwise-unbeatable threat. Envision your new form and discard this asset.

When you successfully @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} (extreme or greater) to halt the mutation, activate this ability at no cost. Increase your momentum reset by 1, and discard this asset.
